titleStmt.title: SII 16.264: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 264. (A.R. No. 684 of 1920.) ĪMANI, TENALI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a field.
This is dated Śaka 1486, • • • ., Chaitra, ba. 30 corresponding to 1564 A.D., April 11. The corresponding cyclic year would be Raktākshi.

This damaged and incomplete record registers a gift of land to Kōnēṭi Tiruveṅgaḷanāthayyaṅgāru, son of Tirumalayyaṅgāru, and grandson of Tāḷapāka Kōnēṭi Annamayaṅgāru by Mahamaṇḍalēśvara Siddhirāju Tirumalarājayyadēva Mahārāju, son of Timmarāju and grandson of Siddhirāju Tirumalayya of Harita-gōtra, Āpastaṁbasūtra and Yajuś-śākha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 486 A
saṁvvatsara caitra ba 30 lu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāya
luṁgāru vidyānagaramaṁdgu ratnasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuḍai
pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ sēyucuṁḍaṁgā
nu haritagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra
yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍḍa�ra sidhirāju tiru
malarājuṁgāri pautṛluṁnnu ti
ṁmarāju putṛluṁnnu śrīmanmahā
maṁḍḍalēśvara śidhirāju tiru
dēvamahārājuluṁgāru bhāradvāja gō
tra Āśvilāyana sūtra rukchākhādhyā
yulaina śrīmadvēdamā¨rgapratiṣṭhācā
ṁ¨ryya tāḷapāka kōnēṭi Annamayyaṁgāri
pautṛluṁnnu tirumalayyaṁgāri putru
luṁnnunu kōnēṭi tiruveṁgaḷanāthayyaṁgā
riki daṁḍaṁ sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina bhūdā
Digital edition of SII 16.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
